title: Capture digital media for fieldwork
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Capture digital media for fieldwork demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the intended purpose of digital media.
